posts.text:
Pam Bondi REALLY tried us. Didn’t work.

Video

Pam Bondi is holding a “briefing” with the Oversight Committee. I believe she’s doing this to evade her subpoena. It’s structured exactly like a hearing except she’s NOT under oath & there’s no transcription or video.

We just walked out. We’ll see her at her sworn deposition.
Congrats to my friend @DeliaRamirezIL for winning her primary! She’s rooted and ready to fight for the people. One of the most badass people in Congress.

Fellows will also join national virtual seminars with leaders fighting for democracy across the country.

If you’re ready to build real organizing skills and help protect our democracy, apply today:
bit.ly/demsummer2026

I believe in year-round Organizing. Applications for my Democracy Summer Fellowship are now open! High school & college aged folks will work directly with my campaign in Central Florida — gaining hands-on experience in Organizing, canvassing, phone banking, & event planning.
